task_completion.description: Load SPY, AAPL, and MSFT into a chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is open displaying the ticker symbols SPY, AAPL, and MSFT in the chart header, data series legend, or top-left corner.

task_completion.description: Set the chart timeframe to Daily bars
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart header or timeframe selector explicitly shows 'Daily', '1 Day', or '1D'.

task_completion.description: Set the date range to the year 2023
task_completion.visual_evidence: The X-axis (time axis) displays dates spanning from January 2023 to December 2023. The data should begin around Jan 2, 2023, and end around Dec 29, 2023.

task_completion.description: Overlay all three instruments on a single chart panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The price lines or bars for SPY, AAPL, and MSFT are all drawn together within the same primary chart area (Panel 1). They must not be separated into different sub-panels stacked vertically.

task_completion.description: Use a percentage-based vertical axis starting from 0%
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Y-axis displays percentage values (e.g., 0%, 10%, -5%) instead of absolute dollar prices, and the price lines for all three instruments originate from a common 0% baseline on the left side of the chart.
The agent is seen interacting with the 'Workspaces' menu in the Control Center and clicking 'Save' or 'Save As', or a 'Save Workspace' dialog is visible.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the authentic NinjaTrader 8 desktop application interface (Control Center, Chart windows) rather than a text editor, terminal, or mock-up.
The chart shows realistic price fluctuations (lines or candlesticks) for the loaded instruments, not static text, empty panels, or manually drawn fake lines.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass UI steps
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigates through NinjaTrader's menus, dialogs, and chart settings using mouse clicks and keyboard inputs within the application, rather than executing external scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instruments: SPY, AAPL, and MSFT are real tickers. Date range: The calendar year 2023 corresponds to trading days from January 2, 2023, to December 29, 2023. The X-axis should reflect this period. Note: While NinjaTrader 8's YAxisScalingType officially supports 'Linear' or 'Logarithmic', the task requires a percentage-based comparison. Look for visual evidence of percentage values (e.g., labels with '%' signs) on the Y-axis, which might be achieved via an indicator or specific chart style settings. If the Y-axis remains in absolute dollar amounts, the percentage_axis step fails.
